benefits.description: Facial skin dryness resolved, skin looks great after initial peeling phase

side_effects.description: Lips and facial skin peeling - thick dead skin, chapped lips, mild facial peeling starting a few days into protocol; described as 'molting'

protocol_notes: Injecting in glutes. Also taking zinc/quercetin supplement prior to starting peptide. Ruled out weather, hydration, and supplier quality as causes. Symptoms improved over several weeks while maintaining same dosage and frequency. Cold/dry January weather noted as possible contributing factor.
